PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JONATHAN CHAN, CYNRIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARSON, LYNNE KATHLEEN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. PLAINTIFFS TO EACH HAVE $1000 OF PRINCIPAL.
